ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the construction material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "unit_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the material */,
  "weight_per_unit" REAL /* Weight per unit of the material */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material size */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size description */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the material */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the material */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_sizes_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person who updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES material_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (residential/commercial) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_materials" (
  "project_material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project material */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material size */,
  "required_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity required for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES material_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_materials_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES material_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact person's phone number */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact person's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin/user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of login */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time of logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unit of measurement for the material
Weight per unit of the material
Cost per unit of the material
Unique identifier for each material size
Unique identifier for each inventory record
Quantity of the material in stock
User ID of the person who updated the record
Unique identifier for each project material
Unique identifier for each user session
